title: 10 best herbal capsules for upper abdominal pain
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for upper abdominal pain are a natural remedy that combines the healing properties of various herbs to provide relief from discomfort, cramps, and inflammation in the upper abdomen. These capsules help by reducing symptoms such as bloating, gas, and nausea, allowing individuals to experience improved digestion and overall well-being. Examples of herbal capsules that have shown effectiveness include Ginger-Zingiber officinale-which reduces inflammation, Chamomile-Matricaria chamomilla-which soothes the stomach, and Peppermint-Mentha piperita-which eases muscle spasms. By incorporating these natural remedies into their daily routine, individuals can find relief from upper abdominal pain, improve their digestive health, and enhance their overall quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain a powerful anti-inflammatory compound called curcumin, which has potent analgesic and antioxidant properties. Curcumin works by reducing inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), gastritis, and other conditions that cause stomach cramps, bloating, and discomfort. By soothing the digestive system, turmeric capsules provide natural relief from upper abdominal pain, allowing for improved digestion and overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's Anti-Inflammatory Action: Turmeric contains curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce inflammation in the stomach and small intestine, alleviating pain and discomfort caused by conditions like gastritis, ulcers, and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).

Antioxidant Properties: Turmeric's antioxidant properties help protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to upper abdominal pain.

COX-2 Inhibitory Activity: Curcumin in turmeric capsules has been shown to inhibit COX-2 enzymes, which are responsible for producing prostaglandins that cause pain and inflammation in the stomach and intestines, providing relief from upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain high amounts of curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal pain.
Roots: Turmeric roots have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including upper abdominal pain, due to their ability to stimulate digestion and relieve cramps.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality curcuma longa rhizomes and wash them thoroughly with cold running water.
Dry the washed rhizomes in a warm place for 7-10 days or use a food dehydrator at 50°c.
Grind the dried rhizomes into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered curcuma longa with gelatin capsules (500mg per capsule) in a ratio of 1:5 and fill.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and moisture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain bioactive compounds that have potent anti-inflammatory and digestive properties. The gingerols and shogaols present in these capsules work together to relax the muscles in the stomach and small intestine, reducing spasms and cramps associated with upper abdominal pain. Additionally, the capsules' natural warming effect increases blood flow and reduces inflammation in the area, providing fast and effective relief from discomfort and pain.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Ginger contains anti-inflammatory compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms of upper abdominal pain such as cramps and discomfort.
Antispasmodic properties: Ginger's antispasmodic properties help relax the smooth muscle lining the stomach and intestines, reducing spasms and cramping that can cause upper abdominal pain.

Digestive enzymes regulation: Ginger helps regulate digestive enzymes, which can become imbalanced and lead to upper abdominal pain due to conditions like irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). By regulating these enzymes, ginger capsules may help ease symptoms of IBS-related pain.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in natural compounds like gingerols and shogaols, rhyzomes have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate upper abdominal pain by reducing inflammation.
Roots: Ginger roots contain antioxidants and other bioactive compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginger roots from your garden or purchase high-quality dried ginger powder.
Grind the ginger roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one teaspoon of the ground ginger powder with 100ml of boiling water to make an infusion.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes then strain and filter the liquid to remove any solids.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the strained ginger infusion and store in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and cramping. The menthol in peppermint also has a soothing effect on the stomach lining, which can help to calm inflammation and irritation that may be contributing to the discomfort. Additionally, peppermint's natural anti-inflammatory properties may help to reduce swelling and pain in the upper abdomen, providing fast and effective relief from symptoms such as bloating, gas, and indigestion.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic effect: Peppermint capsules relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and cramps that can cause upper abdominal pain. This is because peppermint oil contains menthol, which has a calming effect on smooth muscle.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in peppermint capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), such as upper abdominal pain.

Gastroprotective effects: Peppermint capsules have been shown to have a protective effect on the mucous membranes lining the stomach and small intestine, reducing inflammation and damage caused by acid reflux and other conditions that can lead to upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of peppermint are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making them effective in relieving cramps and spasms associated with upper abdominal pain.
Rhyzomes: Peppermint rhizomes contain compounds that help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort caused by upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Measure out one cup of dried peppermint leaves mentha x piperita into a large bowl.
Grind the dried peppermint leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 seconds.
Mix the ground peppermint powder with 250 milliliters of boiling water in a saucepan for 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl discarding the solids.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the cooled liquid extract and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its natural anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The herb contains apigenin, an antioxidant that calms the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort in the stomach area. Additionally, chamomile has a gentle sedative effect on the muscles, relaxing any cramping or spasms that may be contributing to the pain. By promoting relaxation and calming the digestive system, chamomile capsules provide effective relief from upper abdominal pain caused by digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and gastritis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile capsules contain apigenin, an flavonoid that has anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal pain such as cramps and discomfort.

Soothing and calming effect: The apigenin in chamomile also has a soothing and calming effect on the muscles and digestive tract, which can help to relax and calm the stomach, reducing feelings of discomfort and pain.

Antispasmodic property: Chamomile's antispasmodic effects can help to reduce muscle spasms and cramping in the stomach, which is common cause of upper abdominal pain, providing relief from discomfort and pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, chamomile roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm upper abdominal discomfort.
Flowers: The delicate petals of chamomile flowers contain apigenin, an antioxidant that reduces inflammation and relaxes smooth muscles to alleviate cramps and spasms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried matricaria chamomilla flowers and store them in an airtight container.
Measure out one hundred grams of the dried chamomile flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix two parts of the powdered chamomile with one part of a carrier agent such as tapioca starch or silica to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the blended mixture and seal them tightly.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain compounds that stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce swelling and irritation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to upper abdominal discomfort. Additionally, dandelion root has been shown to increase bile production, which can aid in reducing bloating and cramping associated with digestive issues. By supporting healthy digestion and liver function, dandelion capsules may provide relief from recurring upper abdominal pain.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as taraxasterol and taraxanthin, can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which may contribute to upper abdominal pain.
Choleretic effects: Dandelion stimulates bile production and release from the liver, which can help alleviate constipation, bloating, and cramping associated with upper abdominal pain.

Digestive stimulants: The bitter compounds in dandelion, such as taraxacoside, can stimulate digestive enzymes and improve digestion, reducing symptoms of upper abdominal pain, such as nausea and vomiting.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used because they contain a high concentration of inulin, a prebiotic that can help soothe and calm digestive issues.
Buds: The buds are used due to their rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 taraxacum officinale leaves and stems from organic sources.
Dry the harvested material in a cool dark place for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried taraxacum officinale into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar.
Mix 500mg of the ground taraxacum officinale with 100mg of gelatin and 100mg of silica in a bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because it contains silymarin, a potent antioxidant that helps to heal and protect the liver cells. The liver is responsible for filtering toxins from the body, and when it becomes inflamed or damaged, it can cause upper abdominal pain. Milk thistle's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce swelling and oxidative stress in the liver, alleviating discomfort and promoting overall digestive health. This natural remedy can provide effective relief from chronic liver disease-related abdominal pain without harsh chemicals or pharmaceuticals.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Silymarin, a flavonoid complex found in milk thistle seeds, has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the liver, which can contribute to abdominal pain relief.

Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in milk thistle capsules have antioxidant properties that help protect the liver cells from damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and pain associated with upper abdominal issues.
Silycristin: Silycristin, another key component of milk thistle, has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, which can help alleviate upper abdominal pain and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silymarin, a bioflavonoid complex that helps protect the liver and reduce inflammation, making them effective for alleviating upper abdominal pain.
Seeds: Containing high levels of omega-3 fatty acids, they help reduce inflammation and promote healing in the digestive tract, providing relief from upper abdominal discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh silybum marianum leaves and flowers in the early morning, ensuring sufficient quantity for preparation.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 12 hours or air drying for 3-4 days.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder, ensuring uniform particle size for better extraction.
Mix 2 tablespoons of the powdered silybum marianum with 1 tablespoon of gelatin in 100ml of distilled water at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared mixture and store them in an airtight container to maintain potency for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce muscle spasms and cramps in the digestive tract. The herb's calming effect on the nervous system also assists in soothing discomfort and tension in the upper abdomen, providing relief from symptoms such as bloating, nausea, and stomach cramps. Additionally, lemon balm's antispasmodic properties help to relax the digestive muscles, reducing contractions and spasms that can contribute to abdominal pain.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic activity: Lemon balm's antispasmodic properties help to relax muscles and reduce muscle spasms in the stomach, which can provide relief from upper abdominal pain.

Soothing effect on digestive tract: Lemon balm has a soothing effect on the digestive tract, which can help to calm inflammation and irritation in the stomach, intestines, and other parts of the GI tract that may be contributing to upper abdominal pain.

Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm's antioxidant properties help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which are thought to contribute to many types of upper abdominal pain, including irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of lemon balm contain a high concentration of rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making them effective in reducing upper abdominal pain.
Leaves: Lemon balm leaves have a calming effect on the digestive system, helping to ease spasms and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves measure one cup of dried flowers for proper dosage.
Dry the harvested leaves using air circulation or shade drying methods within four weeks preparation.
Grind the dried melissa officinalis flowers into a fine powder using mortar and pestle tools grinder.
Mix the ground melissa officinalis powder with 500 milligrams of gelatin capsules one teaspoon preparation.
Fill the gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of their ability to soothe and calm the digestive system. The root extract in licorice capsules contains anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce inflammation and irritation in the stomach and small intestine, which are common causes of upper abdominal pain. Additionally, licorice has natural antacid properties that help neutralize stomach acid, providing relief from heartburn and indigestion.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Herbal licorice capsules contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate discomfort in the upper abdomen.

Flavonoids: Licorice root contains flavonoids, a type of plant compound that acts as a natural antacid and soothes the mucous membranes in the stomach, helping to neutralize acidity and ease upper abdominal pain.

Saponins: Saponins are another key compound found in licorice root that helps to reduce inflammation and improve digestion by inhibiting the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that can cause pain and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant are rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to soothe and calm stomach issues, making them an effective ingredient for alleviating upper abdominal pain.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes (underground stems) of the licorice plant contain compounds that help to reduce inflammation and relax digestive muscles, making them useful for treating upper abdominal pain caused by digestive issues.
remedy_recipe: Measure 100 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root powder and transfer it to a large bowl.
Combine the powder with 50 grams of magnesium stearate and 25 grams of silicon dioxide in the bowl.
Add 200 milliliters of purified water to the mixture and stir for 15 minutes to ensure uniform blending.
Transfer the mixture to a capsule machine and fill capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the blend per capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its soothing properties that calm inflammation and irritation in the digestive tract. The mucilage present in marshmallow root creates a protective barrier on the stomach lining, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with acid reflux, gastritis, and ulcers. Additionally, marshmallow's anti-inflammatory compounds help to reduce swelling and inflammation in the abdominal area, providing relief from chronic pain and discomfort. This natural remedy promotes a healthy gut environment, alleviating upper abdominal pain and promoting overall digestive well-being.
remedy_properties: Mucilage: Marshmallow root contains mucilage, a thick, protective coating that soothes and protects the mucous membranes in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Marshmallow root contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and saponins, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the digestive tract by blocking pro-inflammatory enzymes and pathways.

Emollient properties: The mucilage in marshmallow root has emollient properties, which means it helps to soften and protect the stomach lining, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain caused by conditions like gastritis or ulcers.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.

Buds: Containing a high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, they help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms of upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh marshmallow root althaea officinalis or dried herb powder from reputable suppliers measuring approximately 100g.
Grind the dried herb into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Combine the powdered marshmallow root with 500ml of boiling water in a heat-proof glass container letting it steep for 20-25 minutes.
Strain the liquid mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass container discarding the solids and reserving the herbal tea.
Fill empty capsules with approximately 200mg of the cooled herbal tea per capsule and store in an airtight container at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its natural ability to ease digestive discomfort. The active compound anethole in fennel has a calming effect on the smooth muscle lining in the stomach, which relaxes and soothes cramps, spasms, and bloating. Additionally, fennel's carminative properties help to release trapped gas and reduce inflammation, providing relief from upper abdominal pain caused by indigestion, bloating, and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). By promoting a healthy digestive system, fennel capsules can effectively alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal discomfort.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Fennel contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating pain and discomfort associated with upper abdominal issues.

Carminative properties: Fennel's carminative properties help to expel gas from the stomach and intestines, which can contribute to bloating, cramps, and pain in the upper abdomen, making it a natural remedy for digestive discomfort.
Spasmolytic effects: Fennel's spasmolytic properties help relax smooth muscle in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and contractions that can cause abdominal pain, cramping, and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the fennel plant have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation and alleviate discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.
Seeds: Fennel seeds are rich in carminative properties, which help to release gas and relieve bloating, cramps, and spasms often experienced with upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried foeniculum vulgare leaves and flowers of good quality from a reputable source.
Grind 20 grams of dried foeniculum vulgare into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the ground foeniculum vulgare with 100 milliliters of boiling water to create an infusion for 10 minutes.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass bottle and discard solids after 5 minutes.
Fill gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the strained foeniculum vulgare infusion and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cloves capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain eugenol, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. When consumed as a capsule, eugenol is absorbed into the bloodstream and travels to the affected area of the stomach and small intestine, where it reduces inflammation and discomfort. This can provide relief from upper abdominal pain caused by conditions such as indigestion, gastritis, or irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
remedy_properties: Caryophyllene: This sesquiterpene compound has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which helps to reduce inflammation and ease pain in the upper abdomen.
Eugenol: As a potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, eugenol helps to soothe digestive issues such as indigestion and nausea that often accompany upper abdominal pain.

Phenolic compounds: The phenolic compounds present in clove capsules have antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce bacterial growth and ease muscle spasms that contribute to upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the cloves plant contain a high concentration of eugenol, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that help alleviate upper abdominal pain.

Roots: The roots of the cloves plant have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat digestive issues such as nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain, making them a popular choice for medicinal capsules.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh syzygium aromaticum leaves measuring exactly 30 grams for this recipe.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm oven at 150°f for eight hours or overnight.
Grind the dried syzygium aromaticum leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for ten minutes.
Mix one teaspoon of the ground powder with two hundred milliliters of distilled water and let it steep for twenty-five minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with exactly five grams each of the prepared herbal mixture and seal tightly within three hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ceylon cinnamon capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain a unique compound called cinnamaldehyde, which has potent anti-inflammatory properties. When consumed as a capsule, this compound is absorbed into the bloodstream and travels to the stomach and intestines, where it reduces inflammation and relaxes the muscles that cause cramping and discomfort in the upper abdomen. Additionally, ceylon cinnamon capsules have natural analgesic properties, providing quick relief from abdominal pain and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Cinnamaldehyde: This compound has natural anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate upper abdominal pain caused by conditions such as gastritis or ulcers.

Cinnamon fiber: The soluble fiber in Ceylon cinnamon capsules can help slow down the digestion of carbohydrates, reducing blood sugar spikes that can contribute to upper abdominal discomfort and pain.

Methanol extract: The methanol extract of Ceylon cinnamon has been shown to have gastroprotective effects, protecting the stomach lining from damage caused by acid reflux or ulcers and helping to reduce symptoms of upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, rhyzomes help to alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal pain by reducing inflammation and improving digestive health.
Barks: Containing essential oils with analgesic properties, barks provide relief from upper abdominal pain by numbing the affected area and reducing discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest cinnamomum verum bark in late summer or early fall for optimal volatile oil content.
Dry the harvested cinnamomum verum bark in a well-ventilated area for at least 7 days.
Grind the dried cinnamomum verum bark into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of ground cinnamomum verum bark with 100mg of filler material such as silica or calcium carbonate.
Fill empty capsules with the mixture and seal them in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Galip nut capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain a unique combination of compounds that soothe and calm the digestive system. The capsules work to reduce inflammation and irritation in the stomach and small intestine, providing rapid relief from discomfort and cramping. Antispasmodic properties: The capsules' alkaloids and flavonoids have a relaxing effect on smooth muscle, which can help reduce muscle spasms in the stomach and intestines that contribute to upper abdominal pain.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes of the Galip nut plant contain antioxidants and flavonoids that help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, providing relief from upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried bark of canarium strictum trees in bulk, ensuring minimal contamination.
Dry the harvested bark further by spreading it out under shade for at least 24 hours.
Grind the dried canarium strictum bark into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 1 part of the powdered canarium strictum bark with 3 parts of empty gelatin capsules, ensuring uniform blending.
Fill the blended mixture into gelatin capsules, sealing each one individually within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Angelica capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain the herb angelica sinensis, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and calm the digestive tract. The capsules can also help to reduce muscle spasms in the stomach and intestines, which can contribute to pain and discomfort in the upper abdomen. Additionally, angelica sinensis has been shown to have a gentle warming effect on the body, which can help to ease cramps and spasms, providing relief from upper abdominal pain.

Anti-inflammatory property: The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in Angelica capsules have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the abdominal region that may be contributing to pain.

Digestive soothing property: Angelica's mucilages and saponins have a protective and soothing effect on the digestive tract lining, reducing irritation and discomfort that can exacerbate upper abdominal pain.

Rhyzomes: Angelica rhyzomes are rich in sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic activities, helping to reduce muscle spasms and alleviate discomfort in the upper abdomen.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried angelica archangelica roots and leaves in their entirety for a total of 20 grams.
Grind the plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part ground angelica archangelica with two parts fillers such as cornstarch or silica gel to create a 1:2 ratio.
Fill size 0 empty capsules with approximately 250-500 milligrams of the herbal mixture for a total of 30-60 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Cassia capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried senna alexandrina leaves and flowers in sufficient quantity.
Dry the plant material in shade at room temperature for three to four days.
Crush the dried herb into fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix 400mg of powdered senna alexandrina with 100mg of vegetable stearate and 50mg of silica dioxide.
Fill capsules with the prepared mixture and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain berberine, a bioactive compound that has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Berberine has been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), which often manifests as abdominal pain. Additionally, goldenseal's natural antibacterial properties can help combat H. pylori infections, a common cause of stomach ulcers and pain. By addressing these underlying issues, goldenseal capsules may provide relief from recurring upper abdominal discomfort.
remedy_properties: Berberine: Goldenseal contains berberine, a natural antibacterial agent that can help alleviate symptoms of stomach upset and reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which may contribute to upper abdominal pain.

Beta-carotene: Goldenseal is rich in beta-carotene, a precursor to vitamin A that helps protect the mucous membranes lining the digestive tract and reduces oxidative stress, which may help soothe and heal irritated stomach tissue causing upper abdominal pain.

Coptisine: Coptisine is a bioactive compound found in goldenseal that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract and alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal pain such as bloating, cramps, and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in berberine, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making them effective in relieving upper abdominal pain.
Rhyzomes: Goldenseal's rhyzomes contain a high concentration of alkaloids, including berberine and hydrastine, which help to reduce inflammation and discomfort in the upper abdomen.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 milligrams of dried hydrastis canadensis root powder from a trusted source or produce your own by drying and grinding the roots.
Weigh out 250 milligrams of powdered ginger rhizome to enhance digestive benefits and combine it with the hydrastis canadensis root powder.
Mix the combined herbs with 100 milliliters of distilled water in a double boiler setup, heating the mixture for 10 minutes to facilitate herbal extraction.
Allow the herbal extract to steep for 30 minutes before straining the liquid through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container and discarding the solids.

Fill gelatin capsules with the cooled herbal extract, each containing 250 milligrams of the hydrastis canadensis and ginger rhizome combination, and store in an airtight container for up to six months.

The isoflavones present in red clover have been shown to relax the muscles in the stomach and intestines, reducing cramping and discomfort associated with irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and other gastrointestinal disorders. Additionally, red clover has been found to improve digestion and alleviate symptoms of bloating, gas, and indigestion.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover capsules contain a type of phytoestrogen called isoflavones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and relax smooth muscles, providing relief from stomach cramps and spasms associated with upper abdominal pain.

Flavonoids: The flavonoid compounds present in red clover capsules have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to upper abdominal pain.

Phytoestrogens: As mentioned earlier, isoflavones are a type of phytoestrogen found in red clover capsules, which can help regulate hormone levels and alleviate symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome (PMS), such as bloating, cramps, and breast tenderness, all of which can contribute to upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help reduce inflammation and alleviate upper abdominal pain caused by digestive issues.
Flowers: Contain isoflavones that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe and calm the stomach lining.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried trifolium pratense flowers in sufficient quantity for processing.
Clean and sift the dried flowers to remove any debris or contaminants.
Measure out 100 grams of the cleaned and sifted trifolium pratense flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground trifolium pratense with 500 milliliters of boiling water to create an herbal infusion that steeps for 10 minutes before straining.
Transfer the infused liquid to a capsule machine and fill capsules with the prepared mixture at a dosage of 250 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Slippery elm capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its unique mucilaginous properties. The capsules contain a soothing gel-like substance that coats the digestive tract, providing relief from inflammation and irritation. This natural anti-inflammatory action helps to calm and protect the lining of the stomach and small intestine, reducing discomfort and pain associated with conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), acid reflux, and gastritis. Regular consumption of slippery elm capsules can help to reduce frequency and severity of upper abdominal pain episodes.
remedy_properties: Mucoadhesive properties: Slippery elm's mucilages stick to the lining of the digestive tract, providing a protective barrier that soothes and calms irritation, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Slippery elm contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the abdominal area by inhibiting pro-inflammatory enzymes and cytokines.

Sotheing and demulcent effects: Slippery elm's mucilages create a protective film on the mucous membranes, providing relief from irritation, inflammation, and discomfort, while its soothing properties calm the stomach lining and reduce spasms that can contribute to upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the slippery elm plant contain mucilage, a thick, protective substance that soothes and calms irritated mucous membranes in the digestive tract, providing relief from upper abdominal pain.

Barks: The barks of the slippery elm plant are rich in flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and discomfort in the stomach and small intestine, alleviating upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried ulmus rubra bark, organic cornstarch, and gelatin in separate containers.
Measure one teaspoon of dried ulmus rubra bark and grind it into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground ulmus rubra bark with 250 milliliters of boiling water to create a decoction, allowing it to steep for 10 minutes.

Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another container, discarding the solids, and then add 2 teaspoons of organic cornstarch to thicken the mixture, stirring until dissolved.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the thickened decoction mixture, using approximately 500 milligrams per capsule, and store them in an airtight container for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Summer savory capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because they contain a concentrated extract of the herb summer savory, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties. The capsules work by reducing inflammation in the digestive tract, which is often a primary cause of upper abdominal pain. Additionally, summer savory has been shown to relax the smooth muscle in the stomach and intestines, which can help alleviate cramping and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Summer savory capsules have been shown to reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate upper abdominal pain caused by conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) or gastritis, by reducing swelling and irritation in the stomach lining.

Carminative properties: The volatile oils present in summer savory have a natural ability to release gas bubbles in the digestive tract, helping to relieve cramps, bloating, and discomfort associated with upper abdominal pain caused by conditions such as indigestion or dyspepsia.

Spasmolytic properties: Summer savory has been found to relax the muscles in the stomach and intestines, which can help alleviate upper abdominal pain caused by spasms or cramping due to conditions such as acid reflux or gallstones, by reducing muscle contractions and improving digestion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing inflammation and relieving digestive discomfort.
Seeds: Contain a unique compound called carvacrol, which has natural analgesic properties that can help alleviate upper abdominal pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh satureja hortensis leaves in the morning when they are most potent and dry them using a food dehydrator at low temperature for 2 hours.
Combine 250mg of dried satureja hortensis leaves with 500mg of gelatin powder in a clean glass bowl to prepare the capsule mixture.
Add 10ml of purified water to the bowl and mix well until the mixture forms a uniform paste using a stainless steel spoon for 5 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared mixture, ensuring each capsule contains 250mg of satureja hortensis leaves and seal them immediately after filling.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight glass container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage, ensuring they are kept away from direct sunlight and moisture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black pepper capsules helps with upper abdominal pain because of its unique bioactive compound, piperine. Piperine has natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce inflammation and ease digestion-related discomfort in the upper abdomen. Additionally, piperine may also enhance the bioavailability of other nutrients and herbs, promoting overall digestive health and alleviating symptoms of upper abdominal pain such as bloating, gas, and cramps. By supplementing with herbal black pepper capsules, individuals can experience relief from these uncomfortable symptoms and enjoy improved digestive well-being.
remedy_properties: Piperine: Piperine, a bioactive compound found in black pepper, has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of upper abdominal pain such as bloating and cramping.

Digestive Enzyme Stimulant: Black pepper contains enzymes that stimulate digestive enzymes in the body, improving digestion and absorption of nutrients, which can help relieve symptoms of upper abdominal pain caused by poor digestion or malabsorption.

Gastroprotective Compounds: Herbal black pepper capsules contain compounds such as piperine and caryophyllene, which have been shown to protect the stomach lining from damage, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to upper abdominal pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots of black pepper plant have been traditionally used to treat various digestive issues, including upper abdominal pain.
Rhyzomes: The rhizome, a modified stem that grows underground, contains piperine, a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory compound that can help alleviate upper abdominal discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Collect and clean high-quality black pepper fruits in a dry place away from direct sunlight for at least seven days.
Grind the dried black pepper fruits into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for about five minutes.
Mix one part of the powdered black pepper with two parts of excipient such as silica or calcium carbonate to fill capsules.
Fill empty vegetable-based gelatin capsules with the prepared black pepper mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place away from children and pets for up to six months.
